narrative: RBA hawkishness and Middle East risk premiums drive AUD outperformance after an 8-1 vote to hike rates to 4.35%; AUD/USD firms to 0.7235 while NZD/USD bids to 0.5929 on a Q1 unemployment beat. AUD leads G8 (+0.58%) vs laggard JPY (-0.55%) as the 360bp RBA-BoJ carry spread widens; gold higher +1.50% near $4,637; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.15%; VIX 17.4. Watch New Zealand's RBNZ policy review on May 27.
